profile.name: Michael Magdy Mitry
profile.title: Visual Artist, Architect, Filmmaker & Full-Stack Engineer
profile.tagline: ARCHITECT · FILMMAKER · DEVELOPER · PILOT · NEW CAIRO, EGYPT
profile.bio: Architect. Filmmaker. Developer. Pilot. I build high-end VFX, cinematic campaigns, and data-driven software — leveraging AI to deliver client projects faster than ever without compromising quality.
profile.bioLong: I'm Michael Magdy Mitry — 26 years old, based in New Cairo, Egypt. My story is an unusual one. I grew up knowing I wanted to fly, but life redirected me first through Architecture (Arab Academy, graduated Feb 2024), then through self-teaching filmmaking, VFX, web development, and cybersecurity — before I finally made it to flight school in Cyprus in 2025. Eleven months. Seventy flight hours. 750 hours of ATPL ground school at Dento Aviation. I am a licensed pilot who is also a software engineer, a visual effects artist, and an architect. That combination — the ability to think spatially, technically, and creatively all at once — is what makes my work different. I built ATPLVector, an ATPL e-learning platform, out of my own experience as a student pilot. I built the Strike Boxing CRM from scratch for a real client. I run a YouTube channel, FSMADDNESSPILOT, that taught thousands of flight sim enthusiasts around the world. I leverage AI to finish client projects faster than ever — without sacrificing quality.

services.title: Visual Effects & Filmmaking
services.description: High-end VFX, cinematic content, and full video production workflows for international campaigns and brands.

services.title: Web & App Development
services.description: Full-stack web applications with React 19, TypeScript, Firebase, and Google Cloud Run. From CRM systems to interactive e-learning platforms.

services.title: Photo Editing & Design
services.description: High-end retouching, color grading, brand identity, and UI/UX design for premium visual experiences.

experience.description: Creates high-end visual effects and cinematic content for international campaigns. Leads video production workflows, mentors junior editors, and integrates AI-driven tools into post-production pipelines to accelerate delivery without compromising quality.

Architected and built a full custom CRM system for a boxing club from scratch — React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4 frontend with a serverless Firebase/Node.js backend deployed on Google Cloud Run via Docker. Features include advanced sales attribution, audit logging, automated PDF reporting, CSV parsing, and QR code integration.

Built from personal experience as a student pilot — an interactive ATPL e-learning platform with correct EASA subject taxonomy, a Pilot Dashboard, SVG aircraft inspector, PANS-OPS holding calculators, and gamification built in the language of aviation. The tool you wish you'd had when you were the student.

Eleven months of full-time ATPL training. 750 hours of ground school across all 14 subjects (meteorology, navigation, air law, human performance, mass & balance, flight planning, principles of flight). 70 logged flight hours in the left seat. EASA-regulated IFR and VFR operations. The longest-held dream, finally realised.
Constructed complex architectural models and technical drawings for large-scale urban projects. Coordinated with multi-disciplinary teams to ensure design feasibility and regulatory compliance.

experience.company: Arab Academy For Science And Technology
experience.description: Trusted by the university to produce all cinematic media — events, campaigns, documentation. Delivered at a quality that made professors and administrators look at each other and quietly raise their eyebrows. Chosen to deliver the graduation speech at the end of five years.

education.degree: Bachelor of Architecture and Environmental Design
education.school: Arab Academy For Science And Technology
education.note: Graduation Project: 'ReviveTech' — AI-integrated urban redevelopment plan. Grade: A-. Student Activities Media Head (2020–2022). Chosen to deliver the graduation speech.
750 hours of ATPL ground school. 70 logged flight hours. EASA-regulated IFR/VFR training. CPL in progress. The career that was always the answer.

Systems-level thinking applied to network security, hardware optimisation, full-stack development, and post-production. YouTube channel FSMADDNESSPILOT reached a global audience of flight sim enthusiasts. Architecture, filmmaking, and code — learned completely, obsessively, until understanding the bones underneath.
